description: Canonical style-number (Артикул) contract (PLM-rework Q1, tmp/plm-rework/01-DOMAIN-MODEL.md §2.1). Single source of truth for the SERVER-PROPOSED style number shape and the STRICT manual-override grammar. The generator proposes {SEASON}{YY}-{SEQ}: a per-(season) monotonic sequence, deterministic and globally unique by construction, using only facts present at creation (season code + year) — model_no is allocated lazily at first SKU mint and is NOT available here, so it is intentionally not a token. A manual override is accepted only when it matches manual_override.pattern; the global UNIQUE(style_number) index is the authority on collisions. Any other language's tests should read this file rather than re-typing the rules.

manual_override.description: uppercase alphanumeric segments separated by single hyphens; first segment >= 2 chars; no leading/trailing/double hyphens, no lowercase, no spaces or other characters

golden_generate.note: seq wider than seq_width grows past the minimum padding
